mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_movements ( product_id, movement_type, quantity, note ) VALUES ( #{productId}, #{movementType}, #{quantity}, #{note} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, product_id, movement_type, quantity, note, created_at FROM stock_movements WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN movement_type = 'IN' THEN quantity WHEN movement_type = 'OUT' THEN -quantity ELSE 0 END ), 0) FROM stock_movements WHERE product_id = #{productId}
